title: 相声模拟器
description:
About this release"Xiangsheng simulator" supports English now!
Hi every players,

"Xiangsheng simulator" now support English, including all content translated and FULL English voice. Hope you like this game.

Xiangsheng is a traditional Chinese art usually performed by two persons, which delivers happiness to the audience. In this game, you can experience how Xiangsheng actors perform and make all audience laugh, or just let them refund their tickets:)

If you get any problem or any advice for us, feel free to connect us via waveecstacy@gmail.com.

Thanks for your supporting!

Об игре"There is no need to say right or wrong, merits and demerits, future generations will often comment on it. Children are going into the world, and they don't care about heaven or man's world!"
"Xiangsheng Simulator" is a humorous and witty adventure that takes you into the unique world of Xiangsheng. As a Xiangsheng Penggen, you'll team up with your Dougen partner to deliver a performance filled with laughter. make different dialogue choices, unleash a variety of hidden achievements through unique interactions. Your wit will shine on stage, and the synergy between you and your partner will become the source of laughter.

Xiangsheng is a traditional Chinese performing art. It is typically performed as a dialog between two performers: the Dougen and the Penggen.

PS: This game usually cost 1.5-2.5 hours to encounter all content.

Credits：Lil Anderson，Ethan，Voxed Heart，挚林，艺溪，Olivia Spencer，Zac.Lex，婉儿，三尺小叶。
Special thanks to：Rolone，温大愚老师。
description_short: "Xiangsheng Simulator" is a humorous and witty adventure that takes you into the unique world of Xiangsheng. As a Xiangsheng Penggen, you'll team up with your Dougen partner to deliver a performance filled with laughter.
